onboarding.title: Create your company profile
onboarding.subtitle: Register your business. Our team verifies it before you can post jobs.

verification.pendingBody: Our operations team will verify your company within 2 working days. You can post jobs once verified.
verification.verifiedBody: Your company is verified. You can now post jobs.

account.hrHeadNote: You are signed in as the HR Head for this company. You can post jobs and manage applicants on the company's behalf.

documents.title: Company documents
documents.subtitle: Upload GST, Udyam and other documents for verification.

jobs.title: My Jobs
jobs.empty: You haven't posted any jobs yet
jobs.emptyBody: Post your first job to start receiving applicants.
jobs.closeConfirm: Close this job? Candidates will no longer be able to apply.
jobs.mustVerify: Your company must be verified before you can post jobs.
